prompt: Animate the provided full-body cartoon female astronaut into a front-facing running-in-place loop. Keep the camera locked far enough back so the entire character is visible from helmet top to boot soles with clear green margin above and below in every frame. Use a vertical 9:16 composition with the full body centered, no push-in, no zoom, no crop. The action must read as real running: alternating high knees drive forward, opposite arms pump with bent elbows, one foot supports on contact frames, brief rebound or float between contacts, slight torso bounce from foot impact. Preserve the exact identity and style: blonde hair, blue eyes, round transparent helmet, white and black astronaut suit, cyan and orange accents, black gloves, large black boots, bright green background, clean vector cartoon. Avoid idle bobbing, liquify warping, side view, duplicated limbs, broken knees, melted gloves, broken helmet ring, costume changes, or disappearing feet.
